description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 12, 2024, a Pony.ai AV test vehicle was involved in a minor incident while parked behind Pony.ai’s office at 3501 Gateway 
Boulevard in Fremont. A passenger vehicle, unaffiliated with the company, backed into the rear of the Pony.ai AV test vehicle while it was 
parked. The damage to both vehicles was cosmetic in nature. There were no injuries reported, and the police were not called. 
Print
Clear Form
